
# Reto 
### rsa-pop-quiz
## Descripcion
Class, take your seats! It's PRIME-time for a quiz...nc fickle-tempest.picoctf.net 63580
## Solucion
```
└─$ python                                              
Python 3.13.9 (main, Oct 15 2025, 14:56:22) [GCC 15.2.0] on linux
Type "help", "copyright", "credits" or "license" for more information.
>>> p = 60413
>>> p= 76753
>>> q = 60413
>>> n = p * q
>>> n
4636878989
>>> p = 54269
>>> n = 5051846941
>>> q = n // p
>>> q
93089
>>> q = 66347
>>> p = 12611
... 
>>> p
12611
>>> tn = (p -1) * (q-1)
>>> tn
836623060
>>> m = 63572941714893115471909876155445751335819678864994840913526614064140\
4444047520534288284123635766597343146249135508941371039227338020303879324156\
4304774271529108729717
>>> e = 3
>>> n = 29129463609326322559521123136222078780585451208149138547799121083622\
3332506466787677691262481822074785278810251163327426162018905762808597775134\
1446084275404565109359325172678549936082823789758627806841987551754301354536\

5208981331420875453691798760656572142258269976768440000543271416663205530821\
2842470794875033

>>> c

>>> q = 92092076805892533739724722602668675840671093008520241548191914215399\
8240203720761864607682068149144238022303984109802187419069605271045689702258\

9347073756238894784951597211105734179388300051579994253565459304743059533646\
753003894559

8465433398338364421624871010292162533041884897182597065662521825095949253625\
730631876637
>>> e = 65537
... 
>>> e
65537
>>> tn = (p -1) * (q -1)
>>> tn

>>> d = pow(e, -1, tn)
>>> d

>>> p = 15314304227252786879841261241720443415693514687428299094238669402046\
2861918068684561281763577034706600608387699148071015194725533394126069826857\

5760581055922739434347446260850489149430346636133562577321176456768657561890\
4612461618878116159242008480037553147400255199114559199056650927217803896261\
0261868277621206103809731093742346714694557509731865319425022462496469374223\
4163714239396935883799847254829026759886611125097859360214676130823181113396\
1448757188661718153323658454472693072395989447443940068496611785250069647010\

1351980786954535643294376841480916132922420770975381809977147519088391755560\

>>> e = 65537
... 
>>> n = 23952937352643527451379227516428377705004894508566304313177880191662\
1770618789937989384968181209878170495383652066714019382656637123512397852375\
0734131185838362893218308314561469658541192166299207837610399080698925728947\
2590902167457302888198293135333083734504191910953238278860923153746261500759\
4116202998643951587835095350392597143595267389247369527597535033576149392034\
3409207567616917911245262068773167053490606984596563345574860664906239429328\
9967059348143206600765820021392608270528856238306849191113241355842396325210\
1323580466163129013379874644737990407622718763890314550516409376817454090572\
46190498795697239
... 
>>> q = n // p
>>> tn = (p -1) * (q -1)
>>> d = pow(t , d, n)
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "<python-input-34>", line 1, in <module>
    d = pow(t , d, n)
            ^
NameError: name 't' is not defined. Did you mean: 'tn'?
>>> d = pow(tn , d, n)
>>> d = pow(e , -1, tn)
>>> m = pow(c, d, n)
>>> m
218378661235194013475375491560393839271890611748313869466505982182374965209214385152893
>>> hex(m)[2:]
'7069636f4354467b7741385f74683474696c6c336147616c2e2e6f32383863653534637d'
>>> bytes.fromhex(m)[2:]
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "<python-input-40>", line 1, in <module>
    bytes.fromhex(m)[2:]
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^
TypeError: fromhex() argument must be str, not int
>>> bytes.fromhex[2:]
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "<python-input-41>", line 1, in <module>
    bytes.fromhex[2:]
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^
TypeError: 'builtin_function_or_method' object is not subscriptable
>>> bytes.fromhexhex(m)[2:]).decode()
  File "<python-input-42>", line 1
    bytes.fromhexhex(m)[2:]).decode()
                           ^
SyntaxError: unmatched ')'
>>> bytes.fromhexhex(m)[2:].decode()
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "<python-input-43>", line 1, in <module>
    bytes.fromhexhex(m)[2:].decode()
    ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
AttributeError: type object 'bytes' has no attribute 'fromhexhex'. Did you mean: 'fromhex'?                                                               
>>> bytes.fromhexhex(m)([2:]).decode()
  File "<python-input-44>", line 1
    bytes.fromhexhex(m)([2:]).decode()
                          ^
SyntaxError: invalid syntax
>>> bytes.fromhex(m[2:]).decode()
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "<python-input-45>", line 1, in <module>
    bytes.fromhex(m[2:]).decode()
                  ~^^^^
TypeError: 'int' object is not subscriptable
>>> bytes.fromhex(m)([2:]).decode()
  File "<python-input-46>", line 1
    bytes.fromhex(m)([2:]).decode()
                       ^
SyntaxError: invalid syntax
>>> bytes.fromhex(hex(m)[2:]).decode()

```

```
┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~]
└─$ nc fickle-tempest.picoctf.net 63580
Good morning class! It's me Ms. Adleman-Shamir-Rivest
Today we will be taking a pop quiz, so I hope you studied. Cramming just will not do!
You will need to tell me if each example is possible, given your extensive crypto knowledge.
Inputs and outputs are in decimal. No hex here!
#### NEW PROBLEM ####
q : 60413
p : 76753
##### PRODUCE THE FOLLOWING ####
n
IS THIS POSSIBLE and FEASIBLE? (Y/N):y
#### TIME TO SHOW ME WHAT YOU GOT! ###
n: 4636878989
Outstanding move!!!


#### NEW PROBLEM ####
p : 54269
n : 5051846941
##### PRODUCE THE FOLLOWING ####
q
IS THIS POSSIBLE and FEASIBLE? (Y/N):y
#### TIME TO SHOW ME WHAT YOU GOT! ###
q: 93089
Outstanding move!!!


#### NEW PROBLEM ####
e : 3
n : 
##### PRODUCE THE FOLLOWING ####
q
p
IS THIS POSSIBLE and FEASIBLE? (Y/N):n
Outstanding move!!!


#### NEW PROBLEM ####
q : 66347
p : 12611
##### PRODUCE THE FOLLOWING ####
totient(n)
IS THIS POSSIBLE and FEASIBLE? (Y/N):y
#### TIME TO SHOW ME WHAT YOU GOT! ###
totient(n): 836623060
Outstanding move!!!


#### NEW PROBLEM ####
plaintext : 6357294171489311547190987615544575133581967886499484091352661406414044440475205342882841236357665973431462491355089413710392273380203038793241564304774271529108729717
e : 3
n : 
##### PRODUCE THE FOLLOWING ####
ciphertext
IS THIS POSSIBLE and FEASIBLE? (Y/N):y
#### TIME TO SHOW ME WHAT YOU GOT! ###
ciphertext: 
Outstanding move!!!


#### NEW PROBLEM ####
ciphertext : 
e : 3
n : 
##### PRODUCE THE FOLLOWING ####
plaintext
IS THIS POSSIBLE and FEASIBLE? (Y/N):n
Outstanding move!!!


#### NEW PROBLEM ####
q : 
p : 
e : 65537
##### PRODUCE THE FOLLOWING ####
d
IS THIS POSSIBLE and FEASIBLE? (Y/N):y
#### TIME TO SHOW ME WHAT YOU GOT! ###
d: 
Outstanding move!!!


#### NEW PROBLEM ####
p : 
ciphertext : 
e : 65537
n : 
##### PRODUCE THE FOLLOWING ####
plaintext
IS THIS POSSIBLE and FEASIBLE? (Y/N): 
```
